sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_ID = #v_PBRDID# AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CAR SET OWNDEPTID = #v_P_ODeptID#, OWNDEPTNM = #v_P_ODeptNm#, OWNERID = #v_P_OwnerID#, OWNERNM = #v_P_OwnerNm#, OWNERPOSITION = #v_P_OwnerPos#, OWNERCALL = #v_P_OwnerCall#, CAR_NAME = #v_P_Brd_NM#, CAR_ACCESS = #v_P_AccessNoty#, CAR_NAME2 = #v_P_Brd_NM2# WHERE CAR_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT (CAR_LEVEL + 1) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_ID = #v_P_ClassGB# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT (IFNULL(MAX(Car_Step) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = #v_P_ClassGB# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_CAR ( CAR_UPPER, OWNDEPTID, OWNDEPTNM, OWNERID, OWNERNM, OWNERPOSITION, OWNERCALL, CAR_NAME, COMPANYID, CAR_ID, CAR_GB, CAR_LEVEL, CAR_STEP, CAR_REGISTER_DATE,CAR_URL, CAR_ACCESS, CAR_NAME2, OWNDEPTNM2, OWNERNM2, OWNERPOSITION2, TENANT_ID, DELFLAG
) VALUES ( #v_P_ClassGB#, #v_P_ODeptID#, #v_P_ODeptNm#, #v_P_OwnerID#, #v_P_OwnerNm#, #v_P_OwnerPos#, #v_P_OwnerCall#, #v_P_Brd_NM#, #v_P_CompanyID#,#v_Brd_ID#, 1, #v_Brd_Level#, #v_Brd_Step#, DATE_FORMAT(UTC_TIMESTAMP(),'%Y%m%d'),'', #v_Brd_Access#, #v_P_Brd_NM2#, #v_P_ODeptNm2#, #v_P_OwnerNm2#, #v_P_OwnerPos2#, #tenantID#, 0 )
sqlMap.select: SELECT DEPT_YN , SDA_YN , MEMBER_NAM , MEMBER_ID , ACCESS_LVL FROM TBL_CAR_ACL WHERE CAR_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY FIELD(MEMBER_ID, 'everyone') DESC, ACCESS_LVL ASC, MEMBER_NAM ASC
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(CAR_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = #resID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CAR_GB = '2' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(CAR_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = #resID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CAR_GB = '1' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CAR SET CAR_STEP = CAR_STEP - 1 WHERE CAR_UPPER = ( SELECT S1.CAR_UPPER FROM ( SELECT * FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AS S1 ) AND CAR_STEP > ( SELECT S2.CAR_STEP FROM ( SELECT * FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AS S2 ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CAR_ACL WHERE CAR_ID = #carID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CAR_ACL WHERE CAR_ID = #v_P_RESID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_car set delflag = 1 where car_id = #carID# and tenant_id = #tenantID# and companyid = #companyID#

UPDATE TBL_CAR_ACL SET DEPT_YN = #v_P_Dept_YN#, SDA_YN = #v_P_SDA_YN#, MEMBER_NAM = #v_P_Member_nam#, ACCESS_LVL = #v_P_Access_lvl# WHERE CAR_ID = #v_P_ResID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND MEMBER_ID = #v_P_Member_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
